basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute (CSIR-NEERI) has officially announced the Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advt No. RECRUIT_SD_7A_CEPE_06052026 at the official website CSIR NEERI Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 35 years and hold qualifications such as M.Sc in Environmental Science/Geoinformatics/Remote Sensing & GIS or B.E/B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines can attend the walk-in interview on 18 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and other de

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Environmental science/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing and GIS, B.E/B.Tech in Environmental Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Geomatics
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Environmental science/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing and GIS from a recognized University OR B.E/B.Tech in Environmental Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Geomatics from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR NEERI Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview, and the interview date is 18th May 2026. Candidates should report on this date with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess an M.Sc. in Environmental science/ Geoinformatics/ Remote Sensing and GIS or a B.E/B.Tech in Environmental Engineering/ Civil Engineering/ Mechanical Engineering/ Geoinformatics/ Geomatics from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-I post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA, depending on the candidate's qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Associate-I position announced by CSIR NEERI.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the CSIR NEERI located?
faq.answer: CSIR NEERI is located in Nagpur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 440020.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based job as a Project Associate-I at CSIR NEERI.
